caption: Cumulative Phase 3 cutflow for data raw counts and prompt-normalized MC weighted yields. The rendered step labels are abbreviated for readability; `70-170` is the broad validation mass window and `105-140` is the fit window. Every sample-level cutflow is monotonic, and the fit-window endpoint is 69 data events with 56.6098 expected MC events.
description: Cumulative Phase 3 cutflow for data raw counts and prompt-normalized MC weighted yields. The rendered step labels are abbreviated for readability; `70-170` is the broad validation mass window and `105-140` is the fit window. Every sample-level cutflow is monotonic, and the fit-window endpoint is 69 data events with 56.6098 expected MC events.

caption: Trigger, flavor-matched lepton-ID, and Z-pair sanity efficiencies by final state. Efficiencies are ratios to the previous predeclared selection step; data uses raw events and MC uses prompt-normalized weighted yields.
description: Trigger, flavor-matched lepton-ID, and Z-pair sanity efficiencies by final state. Efficiencies are ratios to the previous predeclared selection step; data uses raw events and MC uses prompt-normalized weighted yields.

cuts.definition: Events with trigBits != 0 divided by finite-core candidates.
cuts.label: Trigger bitmask

cuts.definition: Events passing flavor-matched electron/muon ID divided by valid final-state candidates.
cuts.label: Flavor-matched lepton ID

cuts.definition: Events passing retained Z-pair charge/flavor/mass sanity divided by flavor-ID-selected candidates.
cuts.label: Z-pair sanity

caption: Inclusive four-lepton mass distribution in the broad validation window. MC is normalized with prompt effective cross sections and Metadata denominators, while DY+jets remains the nominal fake proxy. The lower panel shows pulls and the fit-window version is the handoff input for downstream template fits.
description: Inclusive four-lepton mass distribution in the broad validation window. MC is normalized with prompt effective cross sections and Metadata denominators, while DY+jets remains the nominal fake proxy. The lower panel shows pulls and the fit-window version is the handoff input for downstream template fits.

caption: Four-lepton mass distribution for the 4mu final-state category in `105 < m4l < 140 GeV`. These final-state categories are the conditional Phase 4 simultaneous-fit handoff because the classifier split failed the promotion gates and no real VBF category is available; Phase 4 must validate low-count Poisson/toy behavior and MC-stat stability before reporting fit results.

caption: DY+jets fake proxy and TTBar diagnostic reducible-background checks across the predeclared sideband and signal regions. TTBar diagnostic / DY+jets fake-proxy ratios are {'high_sideband_140_170': 0.16348247967166454, 'low_sideband_70_105': 0.09536477980847097, 'signal_window_105_140': 0.04440264879971137}, so TTBar is not promoted to the nominal fake model by the Phase 2 thresholds.
description: DY+jets fake proxy and TTBar diagnostic reducible-background checks across the predeclared sideband and signal regions. TTBar diagnostic / DY+jets fake-proxy ratios are {'high_sideband_140_170': 0.16348247967166454, 'low_sideband_70_105': 0.09536477980847097, 'signal_window_105_140': 0.04440264879971137}, so TTBar is not promoted to the nominal fake model by the Phase 2 thresholds.

metadata.rule: promote if TTBar/DY >= 10% in signal window or >= 20% in either sideband

caption: Angular reconstruction closure summary showing the maximum per-sample median absolute mass difference for recomputed four-vector quantities. All medians are far below the 0.1 GeV closure gate and all angular physical-range checks have zero out-of-range entries.
description: Angular reconstruction closure summary showing the maximum per-sample median absolute mass difference for recomputed four-vector quantities. All medians are far below the 0.1 GeV closure gate and all angular physical-range checks have zero out-of-range entries.

caption: VBF recovery and downscope evidence from branch inventories and allowed join sources. No checked flat ntuple contains real jet or VBF discriminator branches, no allowed upstream join source exists, and no lepton-only category is labeled VBF.
description: VBF recovery and downscope evidence from branch inventories and allowed join sources. No checked flat ntuple contains real jet or VBF discriminator branches, no allowed upstream join source exists, and no lepton-only category is labeled VBF.

metadata.decision: Formal downscope: no real jet or VBF discriminator branches are available in allowed flat ntuples.

caption: S1 final-state category viability summary for the broad MVA comparison window. The categories are retained only as a conditional Phase 4 handoff: 27/33 final-state bins have S+B below five expected events, while S2 classifier categories fail low-stat viability.
description: S1 final-state category viability summary for the broad MVA comparison window. The categories are retained only as a conditional Phase 4 handoff: 27/33 final-state bins have S+B below five expected events, while S2 classifier categories fail low-stat viability.

caption: S1 and S2 approach comparison using the common Asimov counting precision proxy. The nominal choice is `S1_reference_like_final_state_categories` because S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates; final-state binning is a conditional low-count Phase 4 handoff.
description: S1 and S2 approach comparison using the common Asimov counting precision proxy. The nominal choice is `S1_reference_like_final_state_categories` because S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates; final-state binning is a conditional low-count Phase 4 handoff.

S1_reference_like_cut_and_channel_fit.category_viability: conditional low-count handoff: 27/33 final-state fit bins have S+B < 5; Phase 4 must run low-count Poisson/toy validation and MC-stat stability before reporting results

phase4_required_validation: MC-stat stability with sumw2 or per-bin statistical modifiers
alternative rebinning or category merge if the low-count validation fails

S2_angular_kinematic_classifier_categori.reason: S2 is promoted only if the repaired mass-safe classifier passes score-shape, broad-window low-stat, mass-sculpting, and overtraining gates while improving the 80 < m4l < 170 GeV precision proxy by more than 10%.

metadata.common_metric: Asimov counting precision proxy sqrt(S+B)/S in 80 < m4l < 170 GeV, plus broad-window 70 < m4l < 170 GeV MVA score-shape/category/mass-sculpting gates
metadata.selection_reason: S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates; final-state binning is a conditional low-count Phase 4 handoff.

caption: JHEP-like diagnostic BDT classifier ROC curve for the S2 attempt. The repaired classifier has useful separation, but score-shape, mass-sculpting, or low-stat category gates prevent promotion to nominal Phase 4 categories.
description: JHEP-like diagnostic BDT classifier ROC curve for the S2 attempt. The repaired classifier has useful separation, but score-shape, mass-sculpting, or low-stat category gates prevent promotion to nominal Phase 4 categories.

caption: Best S2 classifier score data/MC comparison in the broad validation window. The score-shape gate and low-stat category viability failed, so this diagnostic is preserved as rejected-approach evidence rather than used in the nominal fit.
